title: hypericum cumulicola
intro: Hypericum cumulicola, also known as the Cumulus St. John's Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat anxiety, depression, and insomnia due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hypericum cumulicola include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to support mental health and well-being.
